action: Retrieve avatar IDs using the API: https://mailer.hertzai.com/all_teacher_only_avatars_id_user_id?user_id={user_id} and assign each character a unique avatar ID from the response, storing these associations.
fallback_action: Retry the Avatar Retrieval API Call up to 3 times with increasing delay (e.g., 2s → 5s → 10s) to handle temporary connectivity or service issues. Use Cached Avatar IDs from the last successful session stored in memory, and reassign them to the characters if available.

recipe.steps: Retrieve the user ID from memory to use in the API call.
Call the Avatar Retrieval API using the retrieved user ID and fetch the avatar IDs.
Assign each character a unique avatar ID from the retrieved list.
Save the association of characters to avatar IDs in memory.

generalized_functions.steps: Retrieve the user ID for avatar API call.
Retrieve avatar IDs using the Avatar Retrieval API based on user ID.
